SEARCH
Package p2main

Class STVAlgorithm

java.lang.Object
p2main.VotingAlgorithm
p2main.STVAlgorithm
public class STVAlgorithm extends VotingAlgorithm
STVAlgorithm class implementing the STV voting method. Inherits from VotingAlgorithm.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<Ballot>[]
    counterList
    Array of lists tracking ballots assigned to each candidate

    Ordered map of elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)
    Election

    The election instance being processed

    Tracks when each candidate received their first ballot
    LinkedHashMap<Integer,Integer>
    nonElectedList
    Ordered map of non-elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<Integer>
    breakTie(List<Integer> tieList)
    Breaks ties between candidates using ballot timestamp logic.
    void
    calculateDroopQuota(int numBallots, int numSeats)
    Calculates the minimum votes needed to win a seat (Droop quota).
    void
    displayResults()
    Displays the results of the election.
    void
    redistributeCandidateBallots(List<Ballot> ballots)
    Manages the core STV process including: - Call shuffleBallots() - Distribute all ballot to allCandidate - Election of candidates who reach quota - Call redistributeSurplusBallots() - Call eliminateWeakestCandidate() - Call determineWinnersAndLosers()
    void
    runAlgorithm(List<Ballot> ballots)
    Executes the STV voting algorithm.
    void
    shuffleBallots(List<Ballot> ballots, boolean shuffle)
    Shuffles the list of ballots if shuffle is true.

  • Field Details

    • election

      public Election election
      The election instance being processed

    • droopQuota

      public int droopQuota
      The minimum votes required to win a seat (Droop quota)

    • counterList

      public List<Ballot>[] counterList
      Array of lists tracking ballots assigned to each candidate

    • electedList

      public LinkedHashMap<Integer,Integer> electedList
      Ordered map of elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)

    • nonElectedList

      public LinkedHashMap<Integer,Integer> nonElectedList
      Ordered map of non-elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)

    • time

      public int time
      Timestamp counter for ballot assignments

    • firstBallotTimes

      public int[] firstBallotTimes
      Tracks when each candidate received their first ballot

  • Constructor Details

    • STVAlgorithm

      public STVAlgorithm(Election election)
      Constructs an STVAlgorithm instance. Initializes elected and non-elected candidate lists.
      Parameters:
      election - The election object containing candidates and ballots

  • Method Details

    • runAlgorithm

      public void runAlgorithm(List<Ballot> ballots)
      Executes the STV voting algorithm.
      Specified by:
      runAlgorithm in class VotingAlgorithm
      Parameters:
      ballots - The list of ballots to process

    • shuffleBallots

      public void shuffleBallots(List<Ballot> ballots, boolean shuffle)
      Shuffles the list of ballots if shuffle is true.
      Parameters:
      ballots - The list of ballots.
      shuffle - Boolean flag indicating whether to shuffle.

    • calculateDroopQuota

      public void calculateDroopQuota(int numBallots, int numSeats)
      Calculates the minimum votes needed to win a seat (Droop quota). Formula: (total_ballots / (seats + 1)) + 1
      Parameters:
      numBallots - The total number of ballots
      numSeats - The number of seats

    • redistributeCandidateBallots

      public void redistributeCandidateBallots(List<Ballot> ballots)
      Manages the core STV process including: - Call shuffleBallots() - Distribute all ballot to allCandidate - Election of candidates who reach quota - Call redistributeSurplusBallots() - Call eliminateWeakestCandidate() - Call determineWinnersAndLosers()
      Parameters:
      ballots - The list of ballots to process

    • displayResults

      public void displayResults()
      Description copied from class: VotingAlgorithm
      Displays the results of the election. Implementations must define how results are print to console.
      Specified by:
      displayResults in class VotingAlgorithm

    • breakTie

      protected List<Integer> breakTie(List<Integer> tieList)
      Breaks ties between candidates using ballot timestamp logic. Candidates who received their first ballot most recently lose the tie.
      Specified by:
      breakTie in class VotingAlgorithm
      Parameters:
      tieList - List of candidate indexes with equal votes
      Returns:
      Ordered list of candidates after tie-breaking
